verses.1: Ask of the LORD rain in the spring time,
verses.2: For the teraphim have spoken vanity,
verses.3: My anger is kindled against the shepherds,
verses.4: From him will come the cornerstone,
verses.5: They will be as mighty men,
verses.6: “I will strengthen the house of Judah,
verses.7: Ephraim will be like a mighty man,
verses.8: I will signal for them and gather them,
verses.9: I will sow them among the peoples.
verses.10: I will bring them again also out of the land of Egypt,
verses.11: He will pass through the sea of affliction,
verses.12: I will strengthen them in the LORD.
